scope: Re-deliver exact Baton v0.15.1 protocol, archive, schema, state-carrier, and isolated-install parity with a committed authenticated Git-bundle clean-CI oracle instead of any developer-specific sibling checkout.

test_results.command: bin/sworn doctor --sync-baton twice with explicit disposable homes and no PATH tools

reachability.evidence: cmd/sworn/doctor_test.go:TestDoctorAndBatonDiffV015BinaryReachability authenticates and clones the repository-owned exact-tag bundle under t.TempDir(), then drives the built sworn baton diff command through clean=0, mapped drift=1 without mutation, and missing source=2 without mutation. It also drives the built doctor --sync-baton command in explicit temporary HOME, AGENTS_HOME, CODEX_HOME, CLAUDE_HOME, SWORN_HOME, and XDG_CONFIG_HOME roots with no shell or Go on PATH, observing repair=2 then exact=0. The live built-binary runs reproduced clean diff=0 and sync exits 2 then 0 using disposable roots.

delivered.item: AC-01: exact v0.15.1 mapped bytes, schema identity, VERSION evidence, manifest, and the complete deterministic 78-entry installer archive are checked against a verified exact-tag clone.

AC-02: public baton diff preserves clean=0, deterministic mapped drift=1, and operational/missing source=2 without mutation; the ambiguity schema is independently mapped, embedded, fixture-carried, and graded.
AC-03: independently generated Codex and Claude managed trees and native archive generation agree byte-for-byte and mode-for-mode under fixed umask and contained temporary roots.

AC-04: the three-root doctor transaction remains fail-closed across unsafe topology, fault-injected rollback, durable recovery, and a shell-free built-binary repair path; a completed recovery is publicly distinct at exit 1.
AC-05: exact v0.15 consumers retain canonical generic-check and status facts while state.Status carries an explicitly supplied maintainability object without synthesizing lifecycle state.
AC-06: the committed Git bundle is authenticated as exact v0.15.1 before a clean temporary clone reaches the built binary, with no ambient sibling checkout dependency.
AC-07: missing, truncated, and byte-corrupt bundle fixtures fail before a temporary source-evidence checkout is created.

not_delivered.item: Complete typed maintainability/null semantics, protocol selection, and active-record migration.
not_delivered.why: S20 carries only the bounded opaque status object needed for C-01 parity and must not broaden into lifecycle or migration behavior.

not_delivered.item: Requested-check matching, typed ambiguity resolution, and retirement of generic maintainability dispatch.
not_delivered.why: Those behaviors are outside the C-01 portable-fixture boundary and require their dedicated report/reference authority.
